Notes: 2013 SUNYAC Women's Basketball Championship Tournament Final
New Paltz earns its first-ever SUNYAC title and a bid into the NCAA Tournament
All-Tournament Team: Kathleen Payne, Melissa Graham, Allison McKenna,
Michelle Valle, Alex McCullough, MVP: Maliqua Fisher
Game.Officials: Robert McDow,  Mara Wager,  Randy Mudge
